findings.problem: The chapter's central exposure turns too quickly into tidy symmetry: Ben's debt, Nita's Mina loans, the apartment assignments, and the cut-up card all align into a neat mutual-thesis ending instead of leaving enough asymmetry and damage on the table for shortlist-level force.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the equivalence beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:363 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:371, then the planning/closure beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:543, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:579, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:605 so the two concealments stay related but not fully flattened into the same moral category. Keep the housing plan, but let one concrete disagreement about blame, feasibility, or class sacrifice remain unresolved through the final image rather than letting the severed card function as near-complete closure.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised ending still reaches a provisional housing plan, but after the beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:363 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:543 at least one live disagreement about equivalence, trust, or feasibility remains active on the page through the final paragraph. Fail if the scene again resolves into a clean shared thesis plus a symbolic closure gesture that makes the damage feel settled for the night.

findings.problem: The late-night planning scene starts with strong paper-and-listing texture, then repeatedly steps out of the material problem to summarize what the marriage and household 'really' were. That interpretive pressure reduces the sting of the class drop just when the scene should stay inside rent math, custody logistics, and bodily downgrade.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the apartment-negotiation section anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:507, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:515, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:537, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:555, replace at least some of the thematic summary with concrete consequences: what Leela loses, what either adult physically gives up, what the route becomes, what new manual labor appears, or what humiliations tomorrow's calls will force. Keep the intelligence of the scene, but let the conclusion arise from the paper and apartments rather than from repeated authorial explanation.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a reader can feel the downgrade in the revised passage by reading the listings, costs, route implications, and domestic compromises around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:507 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:555 without needing back-to-back thematic summary sentences to explain it. Fail if the scene still pauses to tell us, in abstract terms, what version of the marriage or corridor the couple has been preserving.

findings.problem: Under peak pressure, Nita and Ben intermittently converge into the same polished, epigrammatic register. The lines are sharp, but too many of them arrive as finished thesis sentences, which blurs the style-bible separation between Nita's over-specific administrative cruelty and Ben's smoothing, hedging, customer-service evasiveness.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the exchange beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:201, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:211, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:255, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:315, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:375, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:555 so Ben sounds more like a man trying to soften, bargain, or reframe until cornered, while Nita stays sharper, more over-specified, and more operationally exact. Replace at least two quotable thesis lines with messier, character-specific language rooted in their own verbal habits.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a cold read of the revised confrontational dialogue around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:201 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:315 can identify which spouse is speaking without dialogue tags because Nita's lines carry precision/control logic and Ben's lines carry smoothing or hedging pressure. Fail if the argument still features multiple interchangeable aphorisms that either speaker could plausibly have delivered.

findings.problem: The chapter leans too often on the same negation-and-correction sentence shape ('Not X. The other kind.' / 'not louder, just more precise' / 'not from humor but...'). Used this many times, the construction stops feeling chosen and starts reading like a fallback emphasis tic.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the emphasis beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:7, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:41, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:173, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:213, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:305, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:537. Replace several of the current negation-led pivots with direct positive description, a fresh sensory comparison, or a more specific verb so the prose keeps surprising rather than repeating the same correction rhythm.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, in the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:7, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:173, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:537, at least half of the current negation-to-true-term beats have been rewritten as direct statements or distinct sensory formulations, and no three highlighted beats rely on the same 'not X / actual Y' logic. Fail if the chapter still announces emphasis primarily by negating one descriptor before substituting another.

summary: Continuity, narrative tense, sanitization risk, and book-wide contraction rules all read as controlled, and the chapter hits its required plot beats with strong material specificity. It still fails this review because the confrontation and planning scenes over-explain their own meaning, let Nita and Ben converge into similarly quotable thesis language, and lean on a repeated negation formula that makes the prose feel mannered at key turns.
